title: EM4ES: ExplorerMapForEveryStructure
description: Serverside mod to add 'explorer maps' for each structure in the registry, bought from wandering traders
body:
Serverside mod to add 'explorer maps' for each structure in the registry, bought from wandering traders from 16-64 emeralds and a compass. 1-4 trades will generate per wandering trader

1.1 is much more efficient and was fixed by CamperSamu (and another author before, but I believe those changes where overwritten

Theoretically it should work with modded structures as well, on first run, a config file will generate in EM4ES/StructureWhitelist.cfg containing all structures in the registry you can remove entries from that to disable maps being generated.
